narrative:
Springfield H (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,089 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
